Toronto Blue Jays placed LF Jonatan Clase on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 21, 2026. Left plantar fasciitis.
Toronto Blue Jays recalled RHP CJ Van Eyk from Buffalo Bisons.
Toronto Blue Jays optioned RHP Lazaro Estrada to Buffalo Bisons.
Toronto Blue Jays recalled LF Yohendrick Piñango from Buffalo Bisons.
Toronto Blue Jays placed LHP Patrick Corbin on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 22, 2026. Left teres major strain.
Toronto Blue Jays transferred RF Addison Barger from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Right elbow inflammation.

news.title: Jays Win!
news.summary: Rays 1 Blue Jays 3 WE SCORED THREE RUNS! It isn’t like we had a lot of hits, just seven (with three walks). But it was enough We scored a run in each of the first, third and seventh innings: Vlad and George (with a walk) had two hits each. Yohendrick, Clement, and Kirk had […]

news.title: Rays @ Jays Game Thread
news.summary: Game #103. Some runs would be nice. Some defense too. The Jays made another move, picking up outfielder Rudy Martin off waivers from the Orioles. The Orioles had just picked him up in trade from the Royals and DFAed him, which I imagine we’ll be doing soon enough. He is a 30-year-old left-handed hitting outfielder […]
news.author: tom dakers
